pi_items.source: Task description explicitly states: 'Build a NextGen Connect channel named Patient Master Index Sync'
Task description states: 'Listens on TCP port 6665 for HL7 ADT messages'
Task description and schema reference both specify table name as 'patient_master_index'
O*NET Code 11-9111.00 is officially for 'Medical and Health Services Managers', not 'Health Information Management Specialist'. Verified via https://www.onetonline.org/link/details/11-9111.00

Verified via O*NET and BLS as the official SOC code for 'Medical and Health Services Managers'. However, this does NOT match the stated occupation 'Health Information Management Specialist'. Health informatics-related occupations use different codes: 15-1211.01 (Health Informatics Specialists) or 29-9021.00 (Health Information Technologists and Medical Registrars).

privileged_info_summary: The task is a synthetic healthcare integration scenario for NextGen Connect. The channel name 'Patient Master Index Sync' is to be created on TCP port 6665 to maintain a deduplicated patient index table called 'patient_master_index' using PostgreSQL upsert logic. All test data (HL7 messages, sample patient records) is synthetically generated. The occupation metadata claims 'Health Information Management Specialist' with SOC code '11-9111.00', but SOC code 11-9111.00 officially corresponds to 'Medical and Health Services Managers' per authoritative O*NET classification.
